standards.title: AETHERIA Identity Token Schema v2
standards.summary: Defines the canonical JWT serialization, claim set, signature algorithm, and validator checklist for citizen identity tokens.

standards.title: Node Interoperability Test Suite
standards.summary: Mandatory regression tests covering API surface compliance, event ordering guarantees, and graceful degradation.

standards.title: Cross-Domain Event Schemas
standards.summary: Shared event types for Assembly votes, Court rulings, and Civic payments, with enforced schema validation.

standards.title: Data Residency & Sovereignty Standard
standards.summary: Mandatory data-classification labels, regional hosting rules, and jurisdictions-of-last-resort for sensitive citizen data.

standards.title: Registry Index Serialization Format
standards.summary: Canonical JSON-LD and CBOR serializations with checksums, canonical URLs, and schema validation hooks.

sovereignty.title: Single-Operator Restriction Policy
sovereignty.summary: No single node operator may control more than 15 % of declared runtime capacity without Assembly review.

sovereignty.title: Open-Source License Requirement
sovereignty.summary: All ministerial software paths must use OSI-approved licenses and expose public repositories by default.

sovereignty.title: Keysafe Rotation Schedule
sovereignty.summary: 90-day rotation for production credentials; emergency rotation procedures under Court ruling contingency.

sovereignty.title: Jurisdictional Fallback Protocol
sovereignty.summary: Defines secondary governance jurisdictions activated when primary nodes become unreachable or compromised.
